On Route 1 near the south end with low-HP Charmander. Best progress is to return to Viridian City to heal and then continue north later.

### Action_reasoning
We’re adjacent to the southern map boundary of Route 1, and Route 1 expands south into Viridian City. Using the overworld transition south avoids more aimless movement and gets us to town.

### Actions
use_tool(overworld_map_transition, (direction="south"))
